title: Specific Aims — UAB Examples
content: Compendium of Specific Aims page examples from University of Alabama at Birmingham (UAB) School of Medicine. Distributed by ORA as a companion resource to Farin Kamangar's 2023-02-13 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Specific Aims'. Provides external benchmark examples that complement the MSU Specific Aims examples in the same seminar packet.
